findings.issue: Home page UCP cards (lines 133, 138, 169, 189) link to /jcp#ucp legacy hash anchor instead of /ucp. UCP now has its own page; the JCP hash is stale.
findings.fix: Sweep index.html: replace href="/jcp#ucp" with href="/ucp" for all 4 UCP cards.

findings.issue: catalog/index.html:347 lists 'Reliance Retail Account v2' as Pilot, but per UCP release notes (Apr-10-2025 entry: 'v2 went live') it is Live. UCP page §02 correctly lists it as live foundation.
findings.fix: Update catalog row 347: change pill from pill-pilot to pill-live, status text from 'Pilot · v2 rolling FY26-27' to 'Live · DPDP-compliant · API-first · 12 channels'.

findings.issue: Section label reads '06 · Release timeline · 14 major shipments · Jan-2024 → Apr-2026' but the section contains 16 timeline cards (added MI + Brand Health rows in this commit). Number drift.
findings.fix: Update section label from '14 major shipments' to '16 major shipments'.

findings.issue: catalog/index.html:145 and :343 list UCP as '80+ formats · 15K+ stores'. UCP page (sourced from Apr-3-2026 release note) says '75+ formats / 15K+ stores'. Catalog overstates by 5+ formats.
findings.fix: Update catalog rows 145 and 343 to '75+ formats · 15K+ stores' to match the source.

findings.issue: Performance numbers (~19 ms p50 API latency · ~300 ms event processing · 500 events/sec sustained) do not appear in any file in docs/UCP Notes compilation/. Source pipeline broken for these specific claims — they were carried forward from the prior /ucp page without being added to the spec's source compilation.
findings.fix: Either (a) ask UCP team for the source doc and add to compilation folder, or (b) drop the specific numbers and replace with qualitative phrasing ('sub-second p50 API latency · sub-second event processing · 500-events/sec sustained').

findings.issue: 'Privacy-compliant 100%' stat tile reads as a quantification of a binary state. Apex reviewer may parse '100%' as a comparable metric and ask 'what's the denominator?'
findings.fix: Replace with a non-percentage framing: 'Privacy-compliant · DPDP / Jio Cloud · TOPs-managed · InfoSec vetted' or replace with a different quantification (e.g., 'Channels InfoSec-vetted · 12 / 12').

findings.section: §04 Brand Health 'Live · L3 today → L4 target'
findings.issue: Source release notes describe Brand Health and Marketing Intelligence as cockpits but do not explicitly state production-live status. Pill 'Live · L3' may overclaim relative to source. Screenshots prove the cockpits exist; production-deployment status needs explicit source citation.
findings.fix: Either (a) add a one-line source note '(deployed: Apr-2026; source: UCP product team confirmation)' under each cockpit pill, or (b) downgrade to 'Building · L3' if cockpits are still in user-acceptance.

findings.issue: Footnote claims '/autonomous' carries L0-L5 definitions. Earlier check showed /autonomous page does not actually carry explicit L0-L5 definitions — only the mega-menu pill says 'L0-L5'. The L3 / L4 paraphrase in the footnote ('operator-validated, automated execution' / 'system-driven decisions with operator oversight') is unsourced.
findings.fix: Either (a) add the L0-L5 definition table to /autonomous and link, or (b) drop the L3/L4 parenthetical paraphrase from this footnote and just say 'See /autonomous for the framework'.

findings.issue: '10 RCS campaigns · 11 to 19 - Apr - 2026' uses 'to' between dates. Register convention is en-dash or arrow.
'RBL retail-brand microsites · InfoSec-vetted' is vague — what are the microsites, how many, what does InfoSec-vetted unlock?
findings.fix: Either expand to 'RBL retail-brand microsites · InfoSec-vetted public-path connectivity for cross-format login' or move to a sub-bullet under a parent channel.

findings.issue: Card lede 'Query customer bases via natural language. No SQL.' uses engineering jargon (SQL) in user-facing copy. Apex doesn't write SQL.
findings.fix: Change 'No SQL' to 'No technical setup' or 'No dashboards or queries'.

findings.issue: Video pill says 'YouTube' (platform name) — register style elsewhere uses content-type pills.
findings.fix: Change pill text from 'YouTube' to 'Video' for consistency with the lightbox approach.

findings.section: §04 Brand Health Card B intro paragraph
findings.issue: Em-dash usage in 'do consumers know us, prefer us, use us, trust us — and how do we compare to the competition?' is slightly conversational. Apex register prefers shorter declarative sentences.
findings.fix: Optional polish: split into 'Brand Health answers two questions: do consumers know us, prefer us, use us, trust us — and how do we compare to the competition?'

strengths: Source-traceability rigorous for §05 RD DDD case study — every number (1.25M recipients, ₹20.39 Cr, 5,693 buyers, lift table) verifiable against Analysis_Dashboard.html.
L-rung pills (L3 today → L4 target) explicitly tied to /autonomous reference and MDA letter framing — defensible per-claim for each Marketing OS module.
§04 Marketing OS cockpits now carry visual evidence (10 screenshots) — was zero in v0.9.0; closes the credibility gap on the section that defines the page.

Architecture section (§03) pairs the conceptual 4-layer card grid with the actual UCP architecture diagram and a walkthrough video — gives Apex both the abstract and the concrete answer to 'how is this built'.
§07 Built by table now matches /hirefirst pattern (3-col Role / Person / Owns) and adds RIL Counterparts row — improves register-wide consistency.
Single-paragraph spec at docs/ucp-marketing-os-spec.md with 4 locked decisions makes the page's choices defensible and reproducible.
